articles.title: With Opening Day a week away, it’s surprisingly easy to be excited about these Red Sox
articles.description:
Fans will watch a team that can pitch well, field much better than they did a year ago, and hit plenty — and the result should be a team that plays a crisp, fun style.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown, Jayson Tatum show what’s possible in Celtics’ win over Warriors: 7 takeaways
articles.description:

articles.title: The World Baseball Classic is thriving. Rob Manfred says MLB might consider moving it to midseason.
articles.description:
This year's WBC drew 1,619,839 fans for 47 games, a 24% increase over the previous high of 1,306,414 in 2023.

The post The World Baseball Classic is thriving. Rob Manfred says MLB might consider moving it to midseason. appeared first on Boston.com.
